name: Colwell, Rebecca
motto: The deepest rivers make least din, The silent soul doth most abound in care.
description: Age—Still young. Favorite Occupation—Making baby dresses. Ambition—To excel Mrs. Larrick in cooking popovers. Usually Found—In Quinn's room. Favorite Expression—"Oh! shut up." Noted For—Being nice to people.
text:
The deepest rivers make least din, The silent soul doth most abound in care.
Age—Still young. Favorite Occupation—Making baby dresses. Ambition—To excel Mrs. Larrick in cooking popovers. Usually Found—In Quinn's room. Favorite Expression—"Oh! shut up." Noted For—Being nice to people.

name: Congleton, Melene
motto: Of much speaking cometh repentance, but in silence there is safety.
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer of class (Senior Year)
description: Favorite Occupation—Reading. Ambition—To be a missionary to China. Usually Found—On the way to the post office. Favorite Expression—Good-night! Noted For—Changing her mind.
text:
Of much speaking cometh repentance, but in silence there is safety.
Favorite Occupation—Reading. Ambition—To be a missionary to China. Usually Found—On the way to the post office. Favorite Expression—Good-night! Noted For—Changing her mind.

name: Dean, Ruth
motto: Is prone to mischief, as able to perform it.
clubs: Y. W. C. A. Cabinet (Soph Year)
description: Age—Almost a voter. Favorite Occupation—Telling Tales. Ambition—To be a county supervisor. Usually Found—Hurrying to and fro. Favorite Expression—"Go to Guinea." Noted For—Her charming wit.
text:
Is prone to mischief, as able to perform it.
Age—Almost a voter. Favorite Occupation—Telling Tales. Ambition—To be a county supervisor. Usually Found—Hurrying to and fro. Favorite Expression—"Go to Guinea." Noted For—Her charming wit.

name: Millie, Everett
motto:
The heights by great men reached and kept
Were not attained by sudden flight,
But they, while their companions slept,
Were toiling upward in the night.
description: Age—Sixteen. Favorite Occupation—Making lesson plans. Ambition—To become head of the Thomasville Orphanage. Usually Found—Walking on the Washington road. Favorite Expression—"Good-night!" Noted For—Getting out News Letter.
text:
The heights by great men reached and kept
Were not attained by sudden flight,
But they, while their companions slept,
Were toiling upward in the night.
Age—Sixteen. Favorite Occupation—Making lesson plans. Ambition—To become head of the Thomasville Orphanage. Usually Found—Walking on the Washington road. Favorite Expression—"Good-night!" Noted For—Getting out News Letter.

name: Annie, Blanche Herring
motto: Push is written on every door that leads to success.
description: Age—Ask him. Favorite Occupation—Making dates. Ambition—To become as good a teacher as Miss Eva. Usually Found—In her room—364. Favorite Expression—"Oh, you little pukessence of bug juice!" Noted For—Getting out of everything possible in the line of work.
text:
Push is written on every door that leads to success.
Age—Ask him. Favorite Occupation—Making dates. Ambition—To become as good a teacher as Miss Eva. Usually Found—In her room—364. Favorite Expression—"Oh, you little pukessence of bug juice!" Noted For—Getting out of everything possible in the line of work.

name: Bonnie, Howard
motto:
She's sweet of disposition,
She's loving, wise, and kind,
She's full of true affection,
She cannot be defined.; I declare.
description: Age—Getting younger. Favorite Occupation—Reading love stories. Ambition—To be an ideal flapper. Usually Found—On Fifth street. Noted For—Her sweet disposition.
text:
She's sweet of disposition,
She's loving, wise, and kind,
She's full of true affection,
She cannot be defined.; I declare.
Age—Getting younger. Favorite Occupation—Reading love stories. Ambition—To be an ideal flapper. Usually Found—On Fifth street. Noted For—Her sweet disposition.

name: Jenkins, Trixie
motto: A beautiful form is better than a beautiful face; a beautiful behavior is better than a beautiful form. It is the finest of the fine arts.
description: Age—So old. Favorite Occupation—Helping others. Ambition—To mount the highest round of the ladder of success. Usually Found—On the front campus. Favorite Expression—"You're a sweet ole thing." Noted For—Alert attention and promptness.
text:
A beautiful form is better than a beautiful face; a beautiful behavior is better than a beautiful form. It is the finest of the fine arts.
Age—So old. Favorite Occupation—Helping others. Ambition—To mount the highest round of the ladder of success. Usually Found—On the front campus. Favorite Expression—"You're a sweet ole thing." Noted For—Alert attention and promptness.

name: Lowry, Marie
motto: Few and precious are the words which the lips of wisdom utter.
description: Favorite occupation is bead making. Ambition is to be a librarian. Usually found walking Fifth street. Noted for building air castles.
text:
Few and precious are the words which the lips of wisdom utter.
Favorite occupation is bead making. Ambition is to be a librarian. Usually found walking Fifth street. Noted for building air castles.

name: Outland, Mary
motto: Charm strikes the sight, but merit wins the soul.
clubs: Chairman, Debating Club in Lanier Society
description: Age—She never tells. Favorite Occupation—Flirting with the boys on Fifth Street. Ambition—To get her A.B., A.M., and Mrs. degrees. Usually Found—Hunting for someone to help get out the News Letter. Favorite Expression—"Jumping caterpillars." Noted For—Her musical ability.
text:
Charm strikes the sight, but merit wins the soul.
Age—She never tells. Favorite Occupation—Flirting with the boys on Fifth Street. Ambition—To get her A.B., A.M., and Mrs. degrees. Usually Found—Hunting for someone to help get out the News Letter. Favorite Expression—"Jumping caterpillars." Noted For—Her musical ability.

name: Strassburger, Grace
motto: I have labored, and with no little study, that my teaching and the strong course of my authority might go one way.; Oh, dear!
clubs: Chairman of Debating Committee of Poe Society
President of the Student Government Association
description: For most accommodating we didn't err, In choosing Grace Strassburger.; Age—Who cares? Favorite Occupation—Talking; answering questions. Ambition—To keep coming to E. C. T. C. Usually Found—Buried in a book. Noted For—Befriending girls.
text:
I have labored, and with no little study, that my teaching and the strong course of my authority might go one way.; Oh, dear!
For most accommodating we didn't err, In choosing Grace Strassburger.; Age—Who cares? Favorite Occupation—Talking; answering questions. Ambition—To keep coming to E. C. T. C. Usually Found—Buried in a book. Noted For—Befriending girls.

name: Taylor, Alya
motto: To have friends is to be one.
description: Age—He won't tell. Favorite Occupation—Sleeping. Ambition—To be a married woman. Usually Found—In an Oldsmobile. Favorite Expression—"Lemme tell you." Noted For—Driving a car.
text:
To have friends is to be one.
Age—He won't tell. Favorite Occupation—Sleeping. Ambition—To be a married woman. Usually Found—In an Oldsmobile. Favorite Expression—"Lemme tell you." Noted For—Driving a car.

name: Tillman, Amanda
motto: He most lives, who thinks the most, feels the noblest, acts the best.
clubs: President of A. W. G. F. Club
President of Dormitory Sunday School Class
description: Age—Not fixed yet. Favorite Occupation—Giggling. Ambition—To be Miss Coates' successor. Usually Found—Away from home. Favorite Expression—"Dern (?)" Noted For—Opening boxes.
text:
He most lives, who thinks the most, feels the noblest, acts the best.
Age—Not fixed yet. Favorite Occupation—Giggling. Ambition—To be Miss Coates' successor. Usually Found—Away from home. Favorite Expression—"Dern (?)" Noted For—Opening boxes.

name: Petteway, Lillie Hewitt
description: Age—I won't tell. Favorite Occupation—Working. Ambition—To secure all degrees. Usually Found—Talking to someone. Favorite Expression—"Well—" Noted For—Asking for information.
text: Age—I won't tell. Favorite Occupation—Working. Ambition—To secure all degrees. Usually Found—Talking to someone. Favorite Expression—"Well—" Noted For—Asking for information.

name: Phillips, Ivy M.
description: Age—Small for her age. Favorite Occupation—Arguing. Ambition—To be a genius. Usually Found—In class. Favorite Expression—"Yes, Mamma!" Noted For—Talking.
text: Age—Small for her age. Favorite Occupation—Arguing. Ambition—To be a genius. Usually Found—In class. Favorite Expression—"Yes, Mamma!" Noted For—Talking.

name: Quinn, Cleora M.
description: Age—Only a kid. Favorite Occupation—Practice teaching. Ambition—To be as good a teacher as the one she had during her Senior year. Usually Found—In Beck's room. Favorite Expression—"Girls." Noted For—Crying.
text: Age—Only a kid. Favorite Occupation—Practice teaching. Ambition—To be as good a teacher as the one she had during her Senior year. Usually Found—In Beck's room. Favorite Expression—"Girls." Noted For—Crying.

name: Roebuck, Millie J.
description: Age—Not old enough for him. Favorite Occupation—Hiding from council members. Ambition—To be an aviator. Usually Found—Riding in the elevator. Favorite Expression—"Wouldn't that blow your hat in the creek?" Noted For—Vamping all the men.
text: Age—Not old enough for him. Favorite Occupation—Hiding from council members. Ambition—To be an aviator. Usually Found—Riding in the elevator. Favorite Expression—"Wouldn't that blow your hat in the creek?" Noted For—Vamping all the men.

name: Wright, Pearl M.
description: Age—Just right. Favorite Occupation—Teaching Math and French. Ambition—To teach in Goldsboro. Usually Found—In the clock room assisting the photographer. Favorite Expression—"When I was out West last summer." Noted For—Her beautiful eyes.
text: Age—Just right. Favorite Occupation—Teaching Math and French. Ambition—To teach in Goldsboro. Usually Found—In the clock room assisting the photographer. Favorite Expression—"When I was out West last summer." Noted For—Her beautiful eyes.

name: Dail, Kathleen
motto: Kathleen is "apt" in everything that she undertakes.
text: Kathleen is "apt" in everything that she undertakes.

name: Edwards, Annie Mae
motto: "Buddie" says, "Never let your studies interfere with your education."
text: "Buddie" says, "Never let your studies interfere with your education."

name: Evans, Mattie
description: She is unassuming, but not for the lack of good qualities to boast of.
text: She is unassuming, but not for the lack of good qualities to boast of.

name: Isles, Estelle
motto: We leave thy praises unexpressed. We leave thy greatness to be guessed.
text: We leave thy praises unexpressed. We leave thy greatness to be guessed.

name: Jackson, Janie
description: A good sport—yes! A good student—decidedly! A good friend—surely!
text: A good sport—yes! A good student—decidedly! A good friend—surely!

name: Johnston, Maude
motto: Does everybody 'lack' Maude? Um, H'm! They do 'lack' her.
text: Does everybody 'lack' Maude? Um, H'm! They do 'lack' her.

name: Lee, Rachel
motto: Is talking loud and a great deal inherited? Well, if it isn't, Rachel has acquired a considerable amount of skill.
text: Is talking loud and a great deal inherited? Well, if it isn't, Rachel has acquired a considerable amount of skill.

name: McArthur, Shelton
motto: With her amiable nature "Shel" makes friends wherever she goes.
text: With her amiable nature "Shel" makes friends wherever she goes.

name: Piland, Bertha
motto: Two kinds of persons ask questions: those who know nothing, and those who know everything. Bertha is one of the latter.
text: Two kinds of persons ask questions: those who know nothing, and those who know everything. Bertha is one of the latter.

name: Smith, Frances
motto: Not too serious! Not too gay! But indifferent in every way.
text: Not too serious! Not too gay! But indifferent in every way.

name: Simmons, Lennie
motto: Success comes to those who labor.
text: Success comes to those who labor.

name: Thomas, Elizabeth
motto: Child! Let me tell you how much work I have got to do! but wait a minute until I announce choir practice.
text: Child! Let me tell you how much work I have got to do! but wait a minute until I announce choir practice.

name: Vick, Christine
description: We think that Christine is a "born leader"; any way she has the key to success.
text: We think that Christine is a "born leader"; any way she has the key to success.

name: Viniarski, Helen
motto: Helen plays while she plays, and knows the limit, And still she gets all the fun that's in it.
text: Helen plays while she plays, and knows the limit, And still she gets all the fun that's in it.

name: Wedmore, Jennette
motto: Our fiddler and chief musician.
text: Our fiddler and chief musician.

name: Worthington, Juanita
motto: You hardly know she is around, She's so quiet and sweet, But when it comes to her studies She is noticeably hard to beat.
text: You hardly know she is around, She's so quiet and sweet, But when it comes to her studies She is noticeably hard to beat.

name: Aiken, Willie Viola
motto: Life without laughter is a dreary blank.
text: Life without laughter is a dreary blank.

name: Abernathy, Beatrice
motto: It's not because you're jolly And never a trifle blue, It's not because words Are never slow and few, But the reason we all love you, It's because you're you.
text: It's not because you're jolly And never a trifle blue, It's not because words Are never slow and few, But the reason we all love you, It's because you're you.

name: Alexander, Edith
motto: A helping hand, and plenty of pep, A ready smile, a friend who helps.
text: A helping hand, and plenty of pep, A ready smile, a friend who helps.

name: Allen, Hazel
motto: A wall of reserve she built around herself, but those who were fortunate enough to find a way through the wall realized the precious jewel that was hidden there.
text: A wall of reserve she built around herself, but those who were fortunate enough to find a way through the wall realized the precious jewel that was hidden there.

name: Archie, Elizabeth
motto: Her happy disposition, Her pleasant smile, Have won her friends For many a mile.
text: Her happy disposition, Her pleasant smile, Have won her friends For many a mile.

name: Andrews, Annie Ives
motto: She is not afraid to say her say, Though the world be against her.
text: She is not afraid to say her say, Though the world be against her.

name: Ashworth, Thelma
motto: In manners gentle, affections mild, In wisdom a woman, simplicity a child.
text: In manners gentle, affections mild, In wisdom a woman, simplicity a child.

name: Mildred, Barnes
motto: "When worry means death, She will live forever."
text: "When worry means death, She will live forever."

name: Bertha, Baxley
motto: "She hath a heart to conceive, An understanding to direct, A tongue to execute and A hand to execute."
text: "She hath a heart to conceive, An understanding to direct, A tongue to execute and A hand to execute."

name: Eunice, Benton
motto: "Kind and pleasant, full of fun, Loving and thoughtful to everyone - that's Eunice."
text: "Kind and pleasant, full of fun, Loving and thoughtful to everyone - that's Eunice."

name: Antha, Black
motto: "Antha is a jolly, good little companion, and an all-round lovable, darling little friend to everyone she meets."
text: "Antha is a jolly, good little companion, and an all-round lovable, darling little friend to everyone she meets."

name: Jane Amanda, Bahnson
motto: "A heart at leisure from itself To soothe and sympathize."
text: "A heart at leisure from itself To soothe and sympathize."

name: Lou Harriet, Batts
motto: "Leave silence to the saints, I am but human."
text: "Leave silence to the saints, I am but human."

name: Hetty, Beatty
motto: "You speak as one who feeds on poetry."
text: "You speak as one who feeds on poetry."

name: Altermise, Boyd
motto: Her ways are true, her conduct blameless, her friendship lasting.
text: Her ways are true, her conduct blameless, her friendship lasting.

name: Bradley, Annie Louise
motto: So earnest in her work and fun, We know not half the work she's done.
text: So earnest in her work and fun, We know not half the work she's done.

name: Brown, Gladys Tyson
motto: Glad is her nickname which describes her well, 'Cause she's always happy with something funny to tell. She has a pure heart and a very noble mind; A girl any sweeter would be awfully hard to find.
text: Glad is her nickname which describes her well, 'Cause she's always happy with something funny to tell. She has a pure heart and a very noble mind; A girl any sweeter would be awfully hard to find.

name: Brown, Thelma
motto: Wisdom and spirit of the universe, Thou soul that art the eternity of thought.
clubs: Vice-President of Y. W. C. A., '25
description: Most Popular.
text:
Wisdom and spirit of the universe, Thou soul that art the eternity of thought.
Most Popular.

name: Bowers, Selma
motto: Here's to a girl with a heart and smile, That makes the bubbles of life worth while.
text: Here's to a girl with a heart and smile, That makes the bubbles of life worth while.

name: Boyette, Sadie
motto: Always ready to do her part, Always striving to do her best, Her goal is not on the level plane, She leaves that for the rest.
text: Always ready to do her part, Always striving to do her best, Her goal is not on the level plane, She leaves that for the rest.

name: Brown, Edna
motto: Her smile has brought her where she is today, 'Cause she wins everyone's hearts along life's way. Tho' she's quite scholarly, 'tis true, Her happy good nature will take her through.
text: Her smile has brought her where she is today, 'Cause she wins everyone's hearts along life's way. Tho' she's quite scholarly, 'tis true, Her happy good nature will take her through.

name: Carawan, Janie Dell
motto: Sweet, true, and always kind. A better pal no one could find.
text: Sweet, true, and always kind. A better pal no one could find.

name: Chalk, Louise
motto: Sympathy is the golden key that unlocks the heart to others.
text: Sympathy is the golden key that unlocks the heart to others.

name: Cleaton, Daisy
motto: When she will, she will, And you may depend on it; When she won't, she won't. And that's the end of it.
text: When she will, she will, And you may depend on it; When she won't, she won't. And that's the end of it.

name: Conwell, Velda
motto: Leave silence to the saints, I am but human.
text: Leave silence to the saints, I am but human.

name: Bullock, Maggie
motto: Interested and true, If she likes you She'll stand by you.
text: Interested and true, If she likes you She'll stand by you.

name: Carter, Lola
description: Lola, we have all learned to love you because of your earnest efforts in trying to make others happy. We have found you to be a quiet and studious girl who takes more interest in her own affairs than the affairs of her neighbors.
text: Lola, we have all learned to love you because of your earnest efforts in trying to make others happy. We have found you to be a quiet and studious girl who takes more interest in her own affairs than the affairs of her neighbors.

name: Cherry, Martha
motto: In her first passion woman loves her lover, In all the others all she loves is love.
text: In her first passion woman loves her lover, In all the others all she loves is love.

name: Cox, Mary
motto: Very quiet and dignified is she, For some man a good wife she'll be.
text: Very quiet and dignified is she, For some man a good wife she'll be.

name: Cutler, Mamie
motto: The making of friends who are 'real' friends is the best token we have of a girl's success in life.
text: The making of friends who are 'real' friends is the best token we have of a girl's success in life.

name: Daniel, Mary Reid
motto: If she will, she will, And you can depend on it; If she won't, she won't, And there's an end on 't.
text: If she will, she will, And you can depend on it; If she won't, she won't, And there's an end on 't.

name: Davenport, Mary K.
motto: A smile for all, a greeting glad, An amiable jolly way she had.
text: A smile for all, a greeting glad, An amiable jolly way she had.

name: Collier, Dora
motto: To know her is to love her; have I not said enough?
text: To know her is to love her; have I not said enough?

name: Creel, Lucille
motto: No one is useless in this world who lightens the burdens of it for someone else, what would we do without her?
text: No one is useless in this world who lightens the burdens of it for someone else, what would we do without her?

name: Daniel, Rubie
motto: Sweet, true and always kind, A better pal no one could find.
text: Sweet, true and always kind, A better pal no one could find.

name: Sallie May Dees
motto: Talk, and Sallie talks with you, Cease, and Sallie talks alone.
text: Talk, and Sallie talks with you, Cease, and Sallie talks alone.

name: Florence Dean
motto: It is tranquil people who accomplish much.
text: It is tranquil people who accomplish much.

name: Hettie Draper
motto: She that was ever fair and ever proud, had tongue at will and yet never loud.
text: She that was ever fair and ever proud, had tongue at will and yet never loud.

name: Ruby Mae Delemar
motto: Her air, her manners, All who saw admired.
text: Her air, her manners, All who saw admired.

name: Daisy Edwards
motto: Sweet, true and always kind, A better pal no one could find.
text: Sweet, true and always kind, A better pal no one could find.

name: Mary Edwards
motto: She is ever a good sport, and a true friend, And one upon whom we may safely depend.
text: She is ever a good sport, and a true friend, And one upon whom we may safely depend.

name: Lida Edwards
motto: Oh, lovely eyes of azure blue, Clear as the waters of a brook that runs, Limpid and laughing in the summer sun.
text: Oh, lovely eyes of azure blue, Clear as the waters of a brook that runs, Limpid and laughing in the summer sun.

name: Thelma, Everette
motto: Her air, her manners, all who saw admired, Courteous though coy, and gentle though retired. The joy of youth and health her eyes displayed, And ease of heart her every look conveyed.
text: Her air, her manners, all who saw admired, Courteous though coy, and gentle though retired. The joy of youth and health her eyes displayed, And ease of heart her every look conveyed.

name: Kate, Evelyn Frisbie
motto: There was a little girl Who had a little curl Right in the middle of her forehead, And when she was good, She was very good, But when she was bad She was horrid.
text: There was a little girl Who had a little curl Right in the middle of her forehead, And when she was good, She was very good, But when she was bad She was horrid.

name: Derucha, Gay
motto: Not too sad, not too gay, But a real good pal in every way.
text: Not too sad, not too gay, But a real good pal in every way.

name: Blanche, Evans
motto: Sincerity is to speak as we think, to do as we pretend, and profess to perform and make good what we promise, and really to be what we would seem and appear to be.
text: Sincerity is to speak as we think, to do as we pretend, and profess to perform and make good what we promise, and really to be what we would seem and appear to be.

name: Catharine, Fisher
motto: A smile for all, A greeting glad, A lovable, jolly way she had.
text: A smile for all, A greeting glad, A lovable, jolly way she had.

name: Edith, Furr
motto: It's the songs you sing and the smiles you wear That's a-making the sunshine everywhere.
text: It's the songs you sing and the smiles you wear That's a-making the sunshine everywhere.

name: Hettie, Ruth Gardner
motto: The thing that goes the farthest, Toward making life worthwhile, That costs the least and does the most Is just a sunny smile.
text: The thing that goes the farthest, Toward making life worthwhile, That costs the least and does the most Is just a sunny smile.

name: Myrtle, Geddie
motto: She's kind, she's modest, sincere and true, More studious, more generous than most of you.
text: She's kind, she's modest, sincere and true, More studious, more generous than most of you.

name: Julia, Grant
motto: Always dependable, always gay, A jolly good fellow in every way.
text: Always dependable, always gay, A jolly good fellow in every way.

name: Annie Virginia, Gray
motto: A willing worker, full of mirth, We need more like her on this earth.
text: A willing worker, full of mirth, We need more like her on this earth.

name: Elinor, Grimes
motto: She is not a 'Comedy of Errors,' Nor a 'Midsummer Night's Dream,' But take it 'As You Like It,' She is just what she seems.
text: She is not a 'Comedy of Errors,' Nor a 'Midsummer Night's Dream,' But take it 'As You Like It,' She is just what she seems.

name: Katie Lou, Geddie
motto: She is ever a good sport and a true friend, And one upon whom you may safely depend.
text: She is ever a good sport and a true friend, And one upon whom you may safely depend.

name: Sarah Crayton, Gilliam
motto: 'Tis tranquil people that accomplish much.
text: 'Tis tranquil people that accomplish much.

name: Elizabeth, Gravely
motto: For she is wise if I can judge of her, and fair she is, if that mine eyes are true, and true she is, as she hath proved herself.
clubs: Representative on "Tecoman" Staff from Athletic Association
text: For she is wise if I can judge of her, and fair she is, if that mine eyes are true, and true she is, as she hath proved herself.

name: Hooks, Mary Ethel
motto: A cheerful companion is worth gold. There was a soft and gentle grace, A cast of thought upon her face.
text: A cheerful companion is worth gold. There was a soft and gentle grace, A cast of thought upon her face.

name: Horton, Margie Lee
motto: She is ever a good sport And a true friend, And one upon whom We may safely depend.
text: She is ever a good sport And a true friend, And one upon whom We may safely depend.

name: Hubbard, Virginia
motto: Not too serious, not too gay, But altogether a jolly good fellow.
text: Not too serious, not too gay, But altogether a jolly good fellow.

name: Hubbard, True
motto: It is well to think well, It is divine to act well.
text: It is well to think well, It is divine to act well.

name: Hartness, Lena
motto: Attractive, refined and very sensible that's Lena.
clubs: Senior Normal Class Representative to Student Government Council
text: Attractive, refined and very sensible that's Lena.

name: Horne, Betty
motto: If you want a friend who's true blue, Who'll do what she says she will do, Depend upon Betty, For her friendship warrants your trust. She is loyal and true.
description: Best Dressed.
text:
If you want a friend who's true blue, Who'll do what she says she will do, Depend upon Betty, For her friendship warrants your trust. She is loyal and true.
Best Dressed.

name: Howell, Stella
motto: Sweet, true, and always kind, A better pal no one could find.
description: For the most dignified, well Twas not hard to select Stella Howell.
text:
Sweet, true, and always kind, A better pal no one could find.
For the most dignified, well Twas not hard to select Stella Howell.

name: King, Ida
motto: Still waters run deep.
text: Still waters run deep.

name: Laidlaw, Vera Jeanette
motto: Her quiet and gentle manner charms many.
text: Her quiet and gentle manner charms many.

name: Livingston, Myrtle Viola
motto: Her air, her manners, all who saw admired, Courteous though coy, and gentle though retired; The joy of youth and health her eyes displayed, And ease of heart her every look conveyed.
text: Her air, her manners, all who saw admired, Courteous though coy, and gentle though retired; The joy of youth and health her eyes displayed, And ease of heart her every look conveyed.

name: Lyon, Lou Davis
motto: Attractive and sweet and hard to beat.
text: Attractive and sweet and hard to beat.

name: Kelly, Margaret
motto: Happiness is cheaper than worry, so why pay the price?
text: Happiness is cheaper than worry, so why pay the price?

name: Knox, Mary Rebecca
motto: Her modest looks the cottage might adorn, Sweet as the primrose that peeps from beneath the thorn.
text: Her modest looks the cottage might adorn, Sweet as the primrose that peeps from beneath the thorn.

name: Lawrence, Lucille
motto: A silent girl is always more admired than a noisy one.
text: A silent girl is always more admired than a noisy one.

name: Nannie, H. Madre
motto: Beloved by all who knew her, Even those who knew her best. Remembering all her perfect neatness, 'Tis to us our earthly feast, How well we knew it when we met! And we hope we'll ne'er forget.
text: Beloved by all who knew her, Even those who knew her best. Remembering all her perfect neatness, 'Tis to us our earthly feast, How well we knew it when we met! And we hope we'll ne'er forget.

name: Velna, Matthews
motto: And thou art worthy, full of power, gentle, Liberal minded and consistent.
clubs: Secretary, A. W. G. F. Club, '24
text: And thou art worthy, full of power, gentle, Liberal minded and consistent.

name: Sarah, Mccallum
motto: Quiet, reserved, dependent, demure, A friend of whom you are always sure.
text: Quiet, reserved, dependent, demure, A friend of whom you are always sure.

name: Merle, Mcadams
motto: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
text: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.

name: Mattie May, Lyon
motto: A sunny disposition is half the battle.
text: A sunny disposition is half the battle.

name: Fannie Latham, Martin
motto: Her ways are true, her conduct blameless, her friendship lasting.
text: Her ways are true, her conduct blameless, her friendship lasting.

name: Helen, Mattocks
motto: She always wears a smile, Is happy and cheerful all the while.
text: She always wears a smile, Is happy and cheerful all the while.

name: McCracken, Gladys Lee
motto:
Looks forward persevering to the last
From well to better, daily self surpassed.
clubs: Representative of Class in Student Government Association, '25
text:
Looks forward persevering to the last
From well to better, daily self surpassed.

name: McKeithan, Norman
motto:
Not too serious, not too gay,
But a rare good fellow when it comes to play.
text:
Not too serious, not too gay,
But a rare good fellow when it comes to play.

name: Mercer, Sarah
description: She has plenty of pep, a helping hand, A ready smile, a friend is 'Sam'.
text: She has plenty of pep, a helping hand, A ready smile, a friend is 'Sam'.

name: Mizelle, Eva
motto: She is pretty to walk with, witty to talk with, and pleasant to think on.
text: She is pretty to walk with, witty to talk with, and pleasant to think on.

name: McCoy, Reba
motto: Let us be of good cheer; remember that the misfortunes hardest to bear are those which never come.
text: Let us be of good cheer; remember that the misfortunes hardest to bear are those which never come.

name: McKeithan, Frances
motto:
What are little girls made of?
Sugar and spice and everything nice.
text:
What are little girls made of?
Sugar and spice and everything nice.

name: McLeod, Grace
motto:
Her happy disposition, her pleasant smile,
Have won her friends for many a mile.
text:
Her happy disposition, her pleasant smile,
Have won her friends for many a mile.

name: Valera, Moore
motto: "What's the use of kicking against things you can't help? Meet life with cheerfulness and fortitude, and smile."
text: "What's the use of kicking against things you can't help? Meet life with cheerfulness and fortitude, and smile."

name: Ellie, Nesbit
motto: "Sincerity is to speak as we think, To do as we pretend and profess, To perform and make good what we promise, And really to be what we would seem and appear to be."
text: "Sincerity is to speak as we think, To do as we pretend and profess, To perform and make good what we promise, And really to be what we would seem and appear to be."

name: Ella, Outland
motto: "She paints the arduous heights where glory lies, And teaches mad ambition to be wise."
clubs: Delegate to National Convention, New York
Delegate to Y. W. C. A. Conference at Blue Ridge, '24
Secretary of T. W. M. Club
text: "She paints the arduous heights where glory lies, And teaches mad ambition to be wise."

name: Mary Ruth, Overcash
motto: "Sometimes we find hearts that are big, Always willing to give their all, In the heart of this girl we find Ideals that will never fall."
clubs: Treasurer of Y. W. C. A., '25
text: "Sometimes we find hearts that are big, Always willing to give their all, In the heart of this girl we find Ideals that will never fall."

name: Lula Blanche, Morris
motto: "A good student, loves a good time, and has a merry soul whose merriment is contagious."
text: "A good student, loves a good time, and has a merry soul whose merriment is contagious."

name: Mary Allean, Myers
motto: "Life is full of laughter, But even laughter ends, Give me instead forever The friendship of my friends."
text: "Life is full of laughter, But even laughter ends, Give me instead forever The friendship of my friends."

name: Rachel, Olive
motto: "A perfect type of womanhood, She stands among the best."
text: "A perfect type of womanhood, She stands among the best."

name: Owens, Lillian
motto: "It's not because you're jolly, And never a trifle blue, It's not because your words Are never slow and few, But the reason we all love you, It's because you're you."
text: "It's not because you're jolly, And never a trifle blue, It's not because your words Are never slow and few, But the reason we all love you, It's because you're you."

name: Phelps, Louise
motto: "Not too serious, not too gay, But a jolly good fellow in every way."
text: "Not too serious, not too gay, But a jolly good fellow in every way."

name: Price, Virla Tom
motto: "You can live without knowledge, You can live without books, But civilized man cannot live without cooks."
text: "You can live without knowledge, You can live without books, But civilized man cannot live without cooks."

name: Propst, Jeannette
motto: "Not too sober, not too gay, But a rare good fellow in every way."
text: "Not too sober, not too gay, But a rare good fellow in every way."

name: Peele, Hallie Rae
motto: "With gentle yet prevailing course, Graceful and useful in all she does, Blessing the blest where'er she goes."
text: "With gentle yet prevailing course, Graceful and useful in all she does, Blessing the blest where'er she goes."

name: Overman, Mary Rachel
motto: "'Mache' is not afraid of work, Yet not in sympathy with it."
text: "'Mache' is not afraid of work, Yet not in sympathy with it."

name: Phillips, Lyda
motto: "'Tis the songs you sing, And the smiles you wear, That make the sunshine everywhere."
text: "'Tis the songs you sing, And the smiles you wear, That make the sunshine everywhere."

name: Margaret E. Roberson
motto: They are never alone that are accompanied by noble thoughts.
text: They are never alone that are accompanied by noble thoughts.

name: Ellen Rouse
motto: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
text: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.

name: Ada Katharine Shaw
motto: Not too serious, not too gay, Just a good sport in every way.
text: Not too serious, not too gay, Just a good sport in every way.

name: Mary Nelson Smith
motto: Although she is small and hardly grew at all, If she were not on the list she would be sadly missed.
text: Although she is small and hardly grew at all, If she were not on the list she would be sadly missed.

name: Mattie Ratliffe
motto: Happy am I; from all care I'm free, Why aren't they all contented like me?
text: Happy am I; from all care I'm free, Why aren't they all contented like me?

name: Minnie Vera Robertson
motto: A smile for all, a greeting glad, An amiable, jolly way she had.
text: A smile for all, a greeting glad, An amiable, jolly way she had.

name: Glennie Mae Scarboro
motto: Far may we search before we find A heart so noble and so kind.
text: Far may we search before we find A heart so noble and so kind.

name: Spruill, Mary Ellen
motto:
Her winning ways and sunny smile
Make her friendship well worthwhile.
text:
Her winning ways and sunny smile
Make her friendship well worthwhile.

name: Stephenson, Aline
motto:
Sober, quiet, pensive and demure,
One of the friends of whom,
You are always sure.
text:
Sober, quiet, pensive and demure,
One of the friends of whom,
You are always sure.

name: Stone, Gladys
motto:
I do not know beneath what sky,
Nor on what seas shall be thy fate,
I only know it shall be high,
I only know it shall be great.
text:
I do not know beneath what sky,
Nor on what seas shall be thy fate,
I only know it shall be high,
I only know it shall be great.

name: Storey, Devilla B.
motto:
A goodly number of pounds,
And great possibilities are rare gifts.
text:
A goodly number of pounds,
And great possibilities are rare gifts.

name: Smith, Sadie
motto:
Not too serious, not too gay,
But loyal and true in every way.
text:
Not too serious, not too gay,
But loyal and true in every way.

name: Stearn, Esther
motto: My heart was social and loved idleness and joy.
text: My heart was social and loved idleness and joy.

name: Stokes, Gladys
motto: Heart to conceive, the understanding to direct, and the hand to execute.
text: Heart to conceive, the understanding to direct, and the hand to execute.

name: Taylor, Ernestine
motto: "He that chooseth me shall get what many men desire."
clubs: Treasurer of T. C. B. Club
text: "He that chooseth me shall get what many men desire."

name: Terry, Marjorie Evelyn
motto: "A smile for all; a greeting glad, A lovable, jolly way she had."
text: "A smile for all; a greeting glad, A lovable, jolly way she had."

name: Teague, Mattie
motto: "As we all know she whom we studious call, is one who thinks of study first of all."
description: Our example set to lead us, Is Miss Mattie Teague, most studious.
text:
"As we all know she whom we studious call, is one who thinks of study first of all."
Our example set to lead us, Is Miss Mattie Teague, most studious.

name: Strickland, Marie
motto: "Marie's calling in life is hard to define; For she is talented in every line."
text: "Marie's calling in life is hard to define; For she is talented in every line."

name: Taylor, Pauline
motto: "A rare good friend In a rare good way."
text: "A rare good friend In a rare good way."

name: Terry, Lucille
motto: "I could not love thee, dear, so much, Loved I not honor more."
clubs: Chairman Campus Committee of S. G. A.
text: "I could not love thee, dear, so much, Loved I not honor more."

name: Thornburg, Willie Blanche
motto: "Here's to a girl with a heart and smile That makes the bubble of life worthwhile."
text: "Here's to a girl with a heart and smile That makes the bubble of life worthwhile."

name: Phoebe E. Trexler
motto: Behind those brown eyes there lies much mischief.
text: Behind those brown eyes there lies much mischief.

name: Isa Gordon Tucker
motto: A merry heart goes all the way.
text: A merry heart goes all the way.

name: Fanny Jones Turner
motto: She's a dainty wee thing, She's a winsome wee thing, She's a bonny wee thing, This Fanny of ours.
text: She's a dainty wee thing, She's a winsome wee thing, She's a bonny wee thing, This Fanny of ours.

name: Carrie Mae Umstead
motto: Sober, quiet, pensive and demure, One of those friends of whom you are always sure.
text: Sober, quiet, pensive and demure, One of those friends of whom you are always sure.

name: Thelma Toler
motto: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
text: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.

name: Blanche Trogdon
motto: Blanche, the delight of her friends, the ringing joy of the 'Hall'.
text: Blanche, the delight of her friends, the ringing joy of the 'Hall'.

name: Mary Etta Tunstall
motto: As a student she is consistent in study, a reliable worker, and a friend worth having.
text: As a student she is consistent in study, a reliable worker, and a friend worth having.

name: Wallace, Alberta
motto: Kind, wholehearted, faithful and true.
text: Kind, wholehearted, faithful and true.

name: Warren, Frances
motto: A countenance in which did meet Sweet records, promises as sweet.
text: A countenance in which did meet Sweet records, promises as sweet.

name: Whichard, Williard
motto: She has a mind that suits with this, her fair and outward countenance.
text: She has a mind that suits with this, her fair and outward countenance.

name: Wade, English Elizabeth
motto: A big heart wishing to do right and to be friends with everybody.
text: A big heart wishing to do right and to be friends with everybody.

name: Ward, Essye Neal
motto: Here's to a girl with a heart and smile, That makes the bubbles of life worthwhile.
text: Here's to a girl with a heart and smile, That makes the bubbles of life worthwhile.

name: Wayne, Esther
motto: Rare compound of quality, noble and true, a plenty of wit and good sense, too.
text: Rare compound of quality, noble and true, a plenty of wit and good sense, too.

name: Whichard, Daisy
motto: A loving heart is the truest wisdom.
text: A loving heart is the truest wisdom.

name: White, Phoebe A.
motto: God made a heart of gold, of gold, Shining and sweet and true; Gave it a home of fairest mold, Blessed it and called it you.
text: God made a heart of gold, of gold, Shining and sweet and true; Gave it a home of fairest mold, Blessed it and called it you.

name: Whitfield, Delilah
motto: When I ope' my mouth to speak let no dog bark.
text: When I ope' my mouth to speak let no dog bark.

name: Whitley, Eula
motto: When she will, she will, And you may depend on it; When she won't she won't, And that's the end on it.
text: When she will, she will, And you may depend on it; When she won't she won't, And that's the end on it.

name: White, Appless
motto: She is neither a 'Comedy of Errors,' Nor a 'Midsummer Night's Dream,' But take it 'As You Like It,' She is just what she seems.
text: She is neither a 'Comedy of Errors,' Nor a 'Midsummer Night's Dream,' But take it 'As You Like It,' She is just what she seems.

name: White, Ruth
motto: Whatever of the best she can conceive, it is her part to be.
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer of Bertie County Club, '25
text: Whatever of the best she can conceive, it is her part to be.

name: Whitehurst, Ida
motto: She that was ever fair, and never proud, Had a tongue at will and yet was never loud.
text: She that was ever fair, and never proud, Had a tongue at will and yet was never loud.

name: Wilkins, Elizabeth
motto: The way to have a friend is to be one.
text: The way to have a friend is to be one.

name: Rose, Elizabeth Williamson
motto: A magnificent specimen of human happiness.
text: A magnificent specimen of human happiness.

name: Rosa, Worsley
motto: A cheerful heart, a cheerful smile, A charm of friendship all the while.
text: A cheerful heart, a cheerful smile, A charm of friendship all the while.

name: Dorothy, Broughton
motto: Never let anyone man worry you.
text: Never let anyone man worry you.

name: Lillian, Van Dyke
motto: A cheerful heart, a cheerful smile, A charm of friendship all the while.
text: A cheerful heart, a cheerful smile, A charm of friendship all the while.

name: Annie, Lois Williams
motto: Who striving, win, and hold The vacant place. All are of royal race. Need was, need is, And need will ever be, For her and such as she.
text: Who striving, win, and hold The vacant place. All are of royal race. Need was, need is, And need will ever be, For her and such as she.

name: Ida, Woodard
motto: Life was made for love and cheer.
text: Life was made for love and cheer.

name: Kathleen, Yates
motto: To know her is to love her, though thou hast known her but a little while.
text: To know her is to love her, though thou hast known her but a little while.

name: Kathleen Spain
motto:
Her silver voice
Is the rich music of a summer bird,
Heard in the still night
With a passionate cadence.
text:
Her silver voice
Is the rich music of a summer bird,
Heard in the still night
With a passionate cadence.

name: Georgia Smith
motto:
Say what you have to say,
Be what you are and no other way.
text:
Say what you have to say,
Be what you are and no other way.

name: Opal McCallum
motto:
Her heart is in her work,
And the heart finds graces in every art.
clubs: Delegate to Y. W. C. A. Conference at Blue Ridge, '25
Chairman of Social Service Committee on Y. W. C. A. Cabinet, '25
text:
Her heart is in her work,
And the heart finds graces in every art.

name: Corinne Tucker
motto: Nothing great was ever achieved without enthusiasm.
text: Nothing great was ever achieved without enthusiasm.

name: Carrie Mae Knight
motto:
In her class she is highly marked,
Though in the library usually parked,
Smiling and singing, she is never blue,
But there to do any service for you.
text:
In her class she is highly marked,
Though in the library usually parked,
Smiling and singing, she is never blue,
But there to do any service for you.
